description: Make voice mode button more prominent with larger size, pulsing animation, distinct color, and subtitle explaining commands. Add 7-day follow-up email processing endpoint with send_followup_email function. Verify existing email wiring is correct.
steps: Update static/css/exam.css to add prominent styling for voice button: larger size, green/purple distinct color, pulsing animation, glow effect.
Update templates/exam_questions.html voice button to be larger with a subtitle explaining available voice commands.
Add send_followup_email() function to app/services/email_service.py with encouraging retake message.
Add POST /api/process-followups endpoint in app/routers/api.py that queries pending follow-ups due, sends emails, and updates status.
acceptance_criteria: Voice button is large, colorful (green/purple), has pulsing animation, and includes subtitle with available commands
send_followup_email() function exists in email_service.py with encouraging retake email content
POST /api/process-followups endpoint exists and processes due follow-up notifications
Email service is correctly wired for both qualified and not-qualified candidates
findings: All 37 tests pass. Voice button now has gradient purple-to-green styling with pulsing glow animation and subtitle text showing available commands. send_followup_email() added with full HTML encouraging email template. POST /api/process-followups endpoint processes scheduled notifications with scheduled_at <= now. Email wiring in exam.py verified correct for both pass/fail paths.
